meaning: n.使徒(指耶稣十二使徒),传道者,最初的传道者
examples: Her mother was a dedicated apostle of healthy eating.
Because Paul was Marcion's fave, fave apostle.
Thecla becomes her own Apostle spreading the message.
Among them was apostle Peter, whose tomb lies beneath the monumental St Peter's Basilica (Basilica di San Pietro).
The Apostle Paul was beaten, shipwrecked, stoned, imprisoned, and all sorts of horrible things.
